0.text: Centriacinar nodular density increases in the upper lobes of both lungs

1.text: Centriacinar nodular density increases in the posterobasal segment of the right lung lower lobe

2.text: Centriacinar nodular density increases in the superior segment of the left lung lower lobe

3.text: 20x15 mm cavitary lesion with a thick wall in the apicoposterior segment of the left lung upper lobe
